title: Norbert Raimund Leisner
text: Home * People * Norbert Raimund Leisner Norbert Raimund Leisner , a German computer chess aficionado, collector of own compiled chess engines and tester. He serves as editor in Ron Murawski's Computer-Chess Wiki [1] , and is frequent poster in Computer Chess Forums , mostly providing informations on chess engines and engine updates.
